guidance: FY27 capex Rs300-350cr, including new Dholera manufacturing facility live by Q4 FY27.
Building 2.5GWh BESS and 100MW electrolyser manufacturing capacity.
Green hydrogen and fuel-cell orders positioned as medium-term growth drivers.
insights: Record order book Rs1,304cr, up 159% YoY, giving strong multi-vertical visibility.
FY26 revenue Rs714.5cr up 80%; PAT Rs58.1cr; declared Rs2/share dividend.
Segments span power transmission (conductors/hardware), BESS, green hydrogen and fuel cells.
Pivoting from transmission hardware toward higher-value energy-transition products.
concall.orderExecution: Rs1,304cr order book is largely executable over the next ~12-18 months, with new-vertical capacity coming on-stream through FY27.
concall.source: Q4/FY26 earnings call 01-Jun-2026; Yahoo Finance, gurufocus.com transcript, whalesbook, concall.in
